title: pelargonium × pavoninum
intro: Pelargonium × pavoninum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium roseum and Pelargonium capitatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oil, tea, and tincture, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
